content: v2 fixes the proof of Claim 4 and adds discussion of pentagonal numbers. See structured highlights for the per-claim breakdown.

structured_payload.summary: v2 fixes the proof of Claim 4 (off-by-one in the bound), adds Claim 5 and Claim 6 about pentagonal numbers, and clarifies Section 3.2.

highlights.description: Corrected an off-by-one in the bound on the alternating sum.
Counter-example showing the bound is tight.
